name: as-processor
description: Tooling for the AS Processor library test environment.

scripts.test:unit: wp-env run tests-cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/as-processor-library-src bash -lc 'composer install --no-interaction && vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml'
scripts.test:e2e: wp-env run tests-cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/as-processor-demo bash -lc 'composer install --no-interaction && composer install --working-dir=tests --no-interaction && tests/vendor/bin/phpunit -c tests/phpunit.xml'
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
